title: nervilia odorata
intro: Nervilia odorata, also known as the fragrant nertera or sweet nertera, is a small, terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Nervilia odorata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote healthy digestion. Herbal preparations of Nervilia odorata are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
